programme.desc: Wildflowers are being destroyed, causing tomato worms to devour the crops on a nearby farm. / The Rangers need to help bats from colliding with wind turbines.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers rescue a beached whale who has been tormented by sonar waves. The Rangers have to stop a bee colony from collapse.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell — a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it.

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: Professor Faustus returns to his beloved Academy, rested and ready to resume his role as Headmaster.

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: Benton Dusk flies to the Academy for a tour of the facility and a long-overdue reunion but his airship goes missing en route!

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: On a trip to the museum, the Awesome Brawlers uncover that a collection of ancient Baku-Balls contains fakes!

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: Dan and Drago head to Vestroia to meet with Pyravian. Meanwhile, back on Earth, the Gate Crushers are back at it trying to close every last gate.

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: On a day off at the beach, Athena and the Awesome Brawlers have a run in with 'Short's Bakugan Academy.'

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: It's roommate bonding week at the Bakugan Academy.

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: Faustus and the Awesome Bralwers need Professor K's assistance to perfect the Elemental Inductor and put a permanent end to the Elemental Surges.

programme.title: Bakugan Evolutions
programme.desc: Just as the Awesome Brawlers and Faustus are about to end the Elemental Storm once and for all, they're attacked!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan — and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Pronto is thrown in jail on trumped-up charges by a corrupt judge, and the only chance to break him out is Eli making a one-in-a-million trick shot.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Long thought to be merely a legend, an Enigmo Slug has finally been spotted.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After a wild ride on the mysterious Flumes — the Underriver that runs beneath all of Slugterra — the Shane gang find themselves dropped into a sea cavern, where they are promptly shanghaied into the crew of the Pirate Captain Malvolio Drake!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A fun trip to the mall cavern turns un-deadly when the place is over run by the zombie-like victims of the Zombus slug.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The four members of the Shane Gang think they’ve found the fifth in Twist, a street-smart kid who volunteers his help when the gang needs it most on a mission gone wrong.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Avalanched inside a frozen cavern, the Shane Gang can’t figure out which is worse: being trapped with a vicious Ice Ogre that only gets bigger the more you shoot it?

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: Mel discovers that the vial keeping the trapped Ethos they captured from Von Faustien is missing, and the Defenders suspect Roodu and Azura.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: The Defenders enter the Spell Zone looking for the fifth icon. They are captured by a doomsday cult, only to discover that the leader plans to use them as a sacrifice! Elsewhere, Brackus gets the four icons, only to be betrayed by Lady K and destroyed by

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: Rion has a dream in which he fails to stop Malco from destroying the realm. It is revealed that Rion is half Ethos and that he is the only one that can ultimately destroy the Ethos within Malco and save Rados.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: With the Dojo under siege by the army of Sigil Slayers, the Mortagarians arrive and join forces with the Defenders to beat back Lady K Tahsh and the Sigil slayers.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: The Defenders secret training is interrupted when an earthquake signals that the monstrously evil Megalith is breaking free.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: On their way to the Monastery of Amos-Yan to recover The Key, a device which will lead them to the four pure stones, Seth, and his fellow Di-Gata Defenders are ambushed by a band of thieves.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: The Monastery burns as Malco and Flinch, powerful agents of the Order Infinis tear it apart looking for The Key.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fusion
programme.desc: As everyone gears up for Battle Bladers, the crab-obsessed Tetsuya is up to his usual tricks defeating everyone - except Gingka.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fusion
programme.desc: Kenta befriends a new blader, Sora, who has amazing power but no control; Sora copies Gingka's special move, but cannot pull it off.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fusion
programme.desc: Gingka is pushed to the limits when he enters an important challenge match and faces a self-claimed magician named Ryutaro.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fusion
programme.desc: Four battles go on in four different stadiums as the competition heats up to make it into Battle Bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Fusion
programme.desc: In an exciting challenge match for Battle Bladers, six bladers are pitted against each other at the same time.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mastermind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's "Hands Off Day!" a city holiday, where the entire city doesn't use their hands for anything. A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles taken prisoners by the Wolves. Laval determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris, and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue.… but something about ShadoWind isn’t quite right.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger has been freed and wants to give out CHI to all tribes of Chima, but he has none. He employs a strange Raven alchemist to produce some fake CHI. But the fake CHI has some very unexpected side effects, and the alchemist has an agenda of his own.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Chima is peaceful yet again. Laval and Cragger go on a joyful Speedor cruise. But the Ravens use the peace to move into Eagle Spires. The Eagles try to get rid of them, but the Ravens are very persistent. It will be up to Eris to trick them to leave.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers arrive at Castle Nocturnia hoping to find the key to defeating the Nightmare King, but the castle won't reveal its secrets easily.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Dream Chasers rush to crack the code to reveal Lunia's secrets while the Nightmare King presses a full-scale assault on Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Nightmare King begins to open a rift to the Waking World while Mateo presses Oz for the truth about Lunia's battle with the Nightmare King.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A night terror is on the hunt at the fall festival and so is the Night Hunter, who appears in the Waking World with a brand-new threat for Mateo.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The barrier to the Waking World has been torn and the Nightmare King invades Brooklyn, where the Dream Chasers must make their final stand!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Missing Z-Blob, Mateo tries to free him to the neglect of his dream chaser duties while the team wrestles with an incursion case and a flock of unusual ravens ignites Izzie's suspicions.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mastermind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Duke gets a high-tech, smart car. He and the temperamental car chase Ice Cream Truck Bandits. The oblivious Ms. Blumfeld turns into a superhero, stopping crimes around the city, as Duke struggles with his orders to arrest her.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl decides to help the whole city but quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania! Billy's mother, Ann, accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Simon Masrani has tasked his newly hired assistant, Claire Dearing, to deliver a trio of dinosaurs to Jurassic World's new super-secret exhibit! Unfortunately, Owen Grady, the animal behaviorist Claire hired to deliver the dinosaurs, is late.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram ... and a salivating T-Rex!

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: A crooked cop testifies against Briscoe after the detectives are involved in a botched drug-bust leading to a drug-dealer's death.

programme.desc: Evidence in a former police officer's murder leads to a suburban housewife represented by women's rights attorney Lanie Stieglitz.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.desc: The murder victim's ex-husband enters rehab just as police are about to arrest him; McCoy butts heads with a judge in Los Angeles.

programme.desc: Law clerks discover a tape that incriminates a new suspect; Ross tricks her ex-husband into discussing a plea.

programme.desc: Erica Mena's birthday bash takes a turn when Tahiry confronts Cyn. Jim Jones learns to cook with Joe to rekindle his romance with Chrissy. Jada demands her money back from PHresher. Tahiry gets some terrifying health news.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Yandy hosts an event to raise money for Jonathan's nephew. Rich's investigation into Olivia's money dispute leads him to his old rival Cisco. Jim has a secret to reveal to Mama Jones about Chrissy. Kimbella and Yandy's beef comes to a violent clash.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Somaya attempts to mend Yandy and Kimbella's feud with the healing power of her spiritual tea. Joe and Cyn show up together to Erica's baby shower, sending Tahiry on a spiral. Safaree works on his new album. Remy faces her court date with Pap.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Erica's pregnancy is reaching full term but Safaree's new album threatens to pull him away. Jim shows Mama Jones her new house. PHresher has to settle his debt with Jada before Jenn finds out. Remy's legal fate is revealed.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Olivia meets with Cisco about her money dispute with Rich. Remy puts her new material to the test when she books a major performance. Jim records for Juelz's new album. Phresher buys an engagement ring. Joe and Cyn define their rekindled relationship

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal a suitcase containing Costa Rican diamonds, but the contents turns out to be Inspector Zenigata. The real diamonds are being shipped to Puerto Rico inside a missile and Lupin must find out the precise launch time to intercept it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaguya, a beautiful woman, separately asks Lupin, Jigen and Goemon to gather the tears of the Yeti, a mermaid's scale, and the liver of a dragon so she can make a secret potion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin has a heart-to-heart with Brody, she wants to give their relationship another shot. Heidi's mother comes to LA, hoping to reconcile with her. Lo and her boyfriend celebrate their anniversary, and Stephanie starts seeing someone new.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Kristin will have to decide if she's going to make a major change in her life, which may force Brody to make a decision about their relationship. Audrina chooses a new, independent life without Justin, but will that be the right choice?

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.desc: Ice traps a treasure of energy on the ocean floor and confounds scientists still trying to solve why it's so slippery.

programme.desc: Glue appears in everything from carpet to Space Shuttles and surgery; explore its trajectory from Neolithic cave dwellers using animal glue on ceremonial skulls to modern Elmer's, 3M tapes, and super glues that can lift 6,000-pound trucks.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The historic one-armed bandits; cutting edge, computerized slot machines; some of the wackiest vending machines; binoculars at popular tourist sites; a unique company that collects and cleans the coins thrown into fountains.

programme.desc: The assembly and surprising history behind the airboat; a wild ride on a big-tired swamp buggy; local delicacies that bring new meaning to acquired taste; a massive engineering project to divert the mighty Mississippi River; pythons and alligators.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A historic survey of adaptation to killer environmental conditions travels to the desert, Arctic, sea, jungle and space, charting the body's physiological responses to extreme circumstances such as frostbite, heatstroke and hypothermia.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Walt, el pavo del desfile de Acción de Gracias, aparece en la casa de Perro y Gato buscando refugio. Perro lo hace entrar y el hambriento Gato lo quiere devorar.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es la noche de Halloween y Gato, se disfraza como Duque Kahanamoku de Hawai y Perro, se disfraza como Conde Perrdrácula, salen en busca de dulces. Un vampiro peruano, Nosferacho, muerde a Perro y lo convierte en vampiro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está entusiasmado porque hoy es el Día de Bromas Raras, la versión del Día de los Inocentes. / Perro y Gato se preparan para volver al reencuentro de la vieja escuela, en donde Gato quiere reavivar su romance con Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el Día Anual de los Padres y, como siempre, Gato y Perro quedan excluidos porque no tienen padres. Perro espera que este año sus padres finalmente aparezcan. Gato insiste en que la búsqueda es en vano.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La nave espacial en la que estaban Perro y Gato cae en un lago congelado donde un monstro del lago termina comiéndoselos como a un bocadillo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Una vez en el pueblo de Perros y Gatos, CatDog logran que todos los perros y gatos de la ciudad se enfrenten los unos a otros. Comienza una batalla en la cual Perro y Gato intentan interferir pero nada sale como lo esperaban.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Hace un año desde que el álter ego del súper héroe Perro el Poderoso salvó al Alcalde Rancio el Conejo de la Parca y ahora Nearburg está celebrando. / Los sobrinos de Tito vienen de visita.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en la Convención de Fanáticos de Mean Bob, mirando una lucha de WWF entre Mean Bob y su enemigo Evil Eric. / Tito sale a caminar, y Gato y Perro aprovechan para entrar a su casa.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Dos bandidos secuestran a Tommy creyendo que él es hijo de un millonario. Pronto se arrepienten de su fechoría cuando Tommy hace un desastre en su escondite. Los Rugrats se embarcan en una aventura en la selva.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Abuelo tiene que tocar la trompeta en el pic-nic de los veteranos, pero Firulais se lleva su dentadura. Didi y Hugo llevan a Tommy a un psiquiatra de niños, después de ver lo que él había dibujado en las paredes con sus crayones.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de ver un programa de miedo en la televisión, Tommy empieza a pensar que su padre es robot. Tommy se mete dentro de la bolsa del cartero y termirma en el correo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo y Didi construyen una casa embrujada para Halloween. Los adultos culpan a Firulais por los accidentes misteriosos que sucedieron en el garaje, pero Tommy cree que su mascota es inocente.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi decide que ya es hora de sacarle el biberón a Tommy, pero él no quiere dejarlo. Tommy se entusiasma cuando ve una pirámide hecha de cajas de cereal Reptar en el supermercado.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras los papás miran un partido de futbol americano, los Rugrats intentan recuperar un biberón de leche chocolatada de Tommy que Angélica robó. Los Rugrats hacen un juicio para saber quién rompió la lámpara de payaso de Tommy.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: La gatita de Angélica, Pelusa, rompe una cerámica y Firulais es acusado injustamente. Los Rugrats van al carnaval de los hermanos Sleazola, donde un hombre vestido de Reptar reparte muestras del cereal.

programme.title: ONE Event

programme.title: ONE Fight Night
programme.desc: Two unbeaten champions collide in a high-stakes battle for light heavyweight supremacy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Minks struggle with a poor hand against the Gifters, Kin'emon tries to assist them, but Dogstorm and Cat Viper stop him and start fighting for the other Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who's-Who invites Drake and Hawkins to a plot to kill Queen. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats are facing two large monsters that remind them of the Giant who they once struggled to take down. As Luffy charges towards them, someone unexpected comes in to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Drake vows to fight alongside Luffy, but Zoro becomes skeptical and challenges him to a fight. Meanwhile, Usopp's practical joke pushes Nami into confronting Ulti, who is infuriated since her brother got attacked.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen uses a new version of the Plague Bullets which will turn the samurai into ogre-like monsters. Meanwhile, the Minks keep pushing the fight against the Gifters and drive Jack into a corner. However, Kaido stands up for his subordinate.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy is hurrying to the rooftop and Yamato is trying to catch up to Momonosuke to protect him, the Akazaya members finally face off against Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Queen, the Lead Performer, blazes away at samurai on the Performance Floor with the special version of the Plague Rounds, which turns them into hideous ogres that corner Zoro and Drake

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: King orders his subordinates to go after Momonosuke. Shinobu tries to protect him, but they are cornered by one of the strong Lead Performers from the Animal Kingdom Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato fights Sasaki and the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division to protect Momonosuke. Meanwhile, Zoro tries to get rid of the Gifters who have turned into Ice Oni, but Queen starts a horrible game which involves the antibody for the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ulti and Page One of the Tobi Roppo chase Nami and Usopp, after being infuriated by their attack as well as Luffy's declaration of becoming the King of the Pirates. Cornered, Nami gives in and Ulti pushes her to say the unthinkable.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot and Wanda step in to help Marco, who is cornered by Big Mom and Perospero. In the meantime, Yamato fights a fierce battle against the Animal Kingdom Pirates Armored Division led by Sasaki, while protecting Shinobu and Momonosuke.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Drake continue to chase Apoo to get the antibody against Ice Oni, while Chopper is trying to figure out how to fight the virus.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hears a woman's scream for help and dashes into the room the scream can be heard from. However, it's a trap set up by Black Maria of the Tobi Roppo. Meanwhile, Luffy and Jimbei who are trying to reach the rooftop get help from the unexpected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Kaido begins the New Onigashima Project, Marco appears in front of Chopper and the others, who are struggling with Ice Oni. The members of the Tobi Roppo continue to give the Straw Hats a hard time while their former member helps Zoro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu that he once confronted a man, who came to Onigashima looking to get Kaido's head. His name was Ace. The two of them engaged in a fierce battle that eventually turned into an important friendship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The formidable Lead Performers of the Animal Kingdom Pirates stand in Zoro's way as he tries to get to the rooftop. Marco sees his late comrade in Zoro's determination and tries to pave the way for him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yamato tells Momonosuke and Shinobu about how Ace gave him hope for the future. Meanwhile, Luffy and the other allied pirates from the Worst Generation make it to the rooftop to finally face off against Kaido and Big Mom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's strong attack reminds Kaido of all the strong ones he's ever met. On the other hand, Luffy, Law, and Kid keep quarreling amongst themselves. Meanwhile, Sanji is caught and interrogated by Black Maria in what he calls "heaven."

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, Kid, Zoro, and Killer keep landing hard blows against Kaido in tandem despite the arguing. However, when Big Mom steps in and unleashes powerful lightning strikes, the tide turns for all except one of the rookies.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pummels Kaido with his well-trained Kong Gatling and delivers a final blow using all his strength. Big Mom tries to fight back, but Law gets in her way and Kid and Killer also try to finish Kaido off.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After watching the Straw Hats' departure to Onigashima, Tama wondered if there was anything she could do to help the Straw Hats and the samurai. Now that she's here on Onigashima, it's time to execute her powerful plan – Operation Kibi Dango!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji is captured and tortured by the merciless Black Maria. She names the terms of his release: to turn over one of his crewmates. He hesitates but has no other option. After much distress, he makes a move that surprises everyone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin bursts in to rescue Sanji along with Brook, and faces Black Maria, who is trying to keep Sanji as her pet. Meanwhile, Yamato, Momonosuke, and Shinobu are spotted hiding by the enemy, and they find themselves on the run again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper works hard to make the cure for Ice Oni, even though he is turning into one himself. Meanwhile, the infected Boss Hyogoro the Flower regains his youth and fights fiercely to protect Chopper and the others.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Seeing everyone turning into Ice Oni, there is nothing that the samurai warriors can do other than grieve. However, it wasn't just them who were devastated by Queen's raging virus. When their desperation and frustration peak, they hear a hopeful voice.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The wounded Akazaya members are surprised to see Kozuki Oden alive. They were disappointed by their failure to take down Kaido, but now with their lord, they are filled with hope to face their sworn enemy again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members run to save Momonosuke, but an unexpected contender stands in their way. Queen gets infuriated after Chopper ruined his plot and goes after him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The returned Orochi clashes the Akazaya members who are trying to save Momonosuke. Meanwhile, Luffy and the others are all covered in bruises, but they unite their strength and launch an attack.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons' impending death stasis sparks a battle of wills between Da'an (Leni Parker) and Zo'or (Anita La Selva).

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jaridian energy beam turns a team of Companion protectors into assassins.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons' fate is decided when Liam (Robert Leeshock) and Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) find Ma'el's regeneration chamber.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: As the fifth season begins, Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) desperately searches for Liam and unwittingly unearths the Atavus, a deadly new race of aliens intent on destroying humanity.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: While Sandoval (Von Flores) strikes a deal with the Atavus, Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) desperately tries to convince Hubble Urick (Frank Moore) about the existence of the deadly aliens.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) fights to destroy the Atavus as they begin a “joining” process that will create Human Atavan hybrids.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) joins forces with a down-and-out former reporter in order to convince the media of the existence of the Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval (Von Flores) resurrects William Boone (Kevin Kilner) in an attempt to lure Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) into Howlyn's (Alan Van Sprang) trap.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) releases Dr. Mataros (Margot Kidder), a convicted serial killer, from death row in a desperate attempt to find a way to kill the Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) tries to sabotage Sandoval (Von Flores) and Howlyn's (Alan Van Sprang) plans for mass-producing Atavus regeneration chambers.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: William Boone (Kevin Kilner) faces an enemy from the past when Sandoval (Von Flores) brings Zo'or (Anita La Selva) back to life as an Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Love is both blind and deadly for J Street (Melinda Deines), who finds herself attracted to a seductive Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) travels back through time in pursuit of a deadly female Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) and Street ( Melinda Deines) check into a spa for some rest and relaxation but find themselves in a life and death struggle with an Atavus.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A beloved resident of a tight-knit Nebraska town is murdered, leading detectives to look at a wide range of suspects before the trail leads to a killer who lives among them.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After a respected educator and mother of two is found dead in small-town Alabama, the investigation focuses on fraught family relationships, but the discovery of a dark secret unveils a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A civic-minded teen is shot to death in his own bed, but just as investigators are closing in on those responsible, a twist leaves everyone stunned.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A divorced mother of three is stabbed to death while recovering from major surgery, but police are frustrated by a lack of evidence, until a startling admission reignites the case.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young woman who was just starting out in life is found assaulted and stabbed to death in her boyfriend's home, detectives work tirelessly to uncover a killer who had previously been above suspicion, leaving the town and police force stunned.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Police searching for the killer of a beloved grandfather find the murderer close to home wielding a shocking weapon.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A young woman is killed in her bedroom, and the evidence appears to point to a clear suspect, but it takes 30 years and new evidence to reveal a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A glamorous 85-year-old millionaire is found stabbed in her basement, sending police on an international investigation that unearths devilish secrets, double lives and a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a beloved elderly woman is viciously murdered, detectives discover a chilling connection to another unsolved murder; the trail points to someone from her past and investigators race to hunt the killer down before they can strike again.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After the burned body of a young nursing student is discovered near a rural road, detectives investigate several suspects until the trail of evidence unearths a disturbing and predatory plot.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When an athletic and popular college student is violently murdered in her apartment, police track down several surprising suspects, including one with a disturbing obsession, before crucial evidence unmasks a dangerous predator no one saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Passions and obsessions turn toxic when a beautiful young law student is found murdered and left in a trash can, leaving police to decipher a web of boyfriends, exes and unrequited lovers.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.desc: After taking a joyride on a rare 100 year old monster tractor, Mike and his brother Robbie take to a property packed with amazing steam engines and rusty relics.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Automotive aficionado Dale gets seriously cranked up over Mike's one-of-a-kind belly tank racer. But the negotiations could crash if the classic can't run leaving Mike out thousands of dollars.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Return to the Moon
programme.desc: The moon is our closest celestial companion. It lights our night sky and gently tugs at our shores. Few have walked on her surface, but her allure remains strong.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system 4.5 billions years ago, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution. Remnant debris, asteroids, and comets are what's left of the building blocks to our celestial neighborhood.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanoes, Indonesia is arguably the most active place on earth. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to some of Indonesia most remote and rarely visited volcanos.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanic folklore is reflected in Mexican history. One of their ancient legends tells the story of the Aztec warrior Popocatépetl - a giant active volcano - who erupts to wake his sleeping princess Iztaccíhuatl, a neighboring extinct ice capped volcano.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: In Indonesia we find regions where the air is so toxic that it's 40 times above human safe levels and sulphuric acid vents from the ground in dense yellowish clouds. Elsewhere, small volcanoes are so active, they are said to erupt every 15 minutes!

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Japan is going through a seismic crisis after the devastating Tsunami of 2011. We look closely at two very dangerous volcanoes; both are considered to be in the top 5 most dangerous on the planet.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: For people who live on active volcanoes, life has an element of impermanence to it. There is always the fear that one day their turn will come, and their home will be in the path of the volcano.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill

programme.title: We Were Soldiers

programme.title: Best of RiffTrax: Villains

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Race travels to Colombia where Racers go mud-diving for emeralds in a volcano.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Reapers defienden Meridian del asalto de una horda de zombis. Pope cree que Maggie es la responsable del ataque, y los habitantes de Alexandria tratan de proteger las defensas de la ciudad, destrozadas por una violenta tormenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick Grimes, policía de una pequeña localidad de Georgia, despierta de un coma y repentinamente se encuentra en un mundo apocalíptico. Desorientado, en busca de su familia y una explicación a lo acontecido, Rick ha de adaptarse al nuevo orden.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: The homeowner fabricates a stone hearth. Richard learns about automatic sprinkler systems. Kevin sees a simulator that shows how the Camp Fire spread. Tom inspects a vent designed to resist embers.

programme.desc: Luke and Crystal move in. Kevin visits a fire test lab. Jose and Anna’s house gets roof shingles. Mark installs a stone veneer. Kevin tours farms. Jenn meets an architect who designed a town memorial.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Paradise residents discuss rebuilding. Tom inspects engineered siding. Richard looks at a backup battery. A former fire chief discusses preparation. At the Memorial, heroes and survivors are honored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Homeowners put the history back into their 1890s Shingle-style home. They’ll restore the home’s original beauty and update it for modern living.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin start to lay subfloor in the dining room. Charlie explains drilling granite for the new garage and driveway. Kevin tours Cape Ann then joins Tommy to move an interior doorway.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Charlie create a cathedral ceiling. Mark breaks through the foundation to make space for mechanicals. Kevin learns about sun tunnels and Richard creates a plan for cooling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mark McCullough matches new stone to the old on the porch. Heath buries electrical underground. Kevin, Molly and kitchen designer Michele look for design inspiration. Tommy creates a barrel ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Rounded-top windows are installed. Easy-install roof shingles go down. Roger takes Kevin fishing. Tommy adds a diamond shingle siding detail. Radiant heat goes in somewhere unexpected: the ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy repairs 130-year-old pocket doors. A new type of solar goes in. Jenn works with landscaper Fred to build a boulder wall. Richard gives a lesson on the modern furnace. Father Mark and son Erik Ferrante showcase the art of mosaic tile installation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Original leaded glass windows are repaired. Jenn and Fred plant a bed of perennials along the new driveway. Mini splits solve a ductwork problem. Homeowner Molly and her designer Shelby make design decisions. Tommy tackles tricky original trim.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns about the invention of the Stillson wrench. Mauro repairs old plaster. Norm repairs broken balusters. Heath installs a new panel. Venetian plaster goes on the dining room ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A brass handrail is created. Mauro paints a chalkboard finish. Repaired balusters get reinstalled. Richard gives a lesson in make-up air. Work begins on a custom table. Heath talks smart electricity.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work is complete on the Cape Ann Shingle Style project. The team tours the finished home, celebrating all of the repaired historic details and the new elements that keep with its original style.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: We take a tour of some of the past This Old House project kitchens. Follow the evolution of appliances from white to stainless as well as cabinet finishes from natural to painted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From large scale industry to small town makers, these factories provide the materials for our projects.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: From demo day to design, we follow every step as the homeowners decide on the components and the crew converts a decades-old butler's pantry kitchen into an up-to-date kitchen for the future.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The guys begin restoration of an 1887 Queen Anne Victorian Cottage. Kevin hears about preserving historic details while updating the interior space and creating a new garage and master suite.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Decorative Queen Anne style barge rafters are reproduced for the garage addition. The antique windows get restored and primed in the shop, re-glazed, and then returned to the house for installation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Bricks are cleaned and repurposed for a new chimney. Staggered shingles are reapplied. Kevin O'Connor learns about glass orbs hidden on Block Island. Richard Trethewey shows a new shower drain.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: After months of meticulous restoration, the stained glass windows are ready to be reinstalled. Electrician Ben has an apprentice. Tom re-creates original shingles. Landscape meeting with homeowners.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Original house details such as the Yankee Gutters and corbels are installed. Kevin O'Connor catches up with the electrician's apprentice. Richard Trethewey looks at the new tankless hot water system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mark McCullough explains cobblestone aprons. The crew reinforces floor joists. Tom Silva and Jeff Sweenor install a drop finial and a swinging window. Kevin O'Connor meets with paint experts.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Ceiling mounted speakers disappear in plaster. The new HVAC system gets turned on. New garage doors are side mounted. The pool is lowered into place. The homeowner makes kitchen design choices.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Chris Diaz
programme.desc: On April 24th, 2021 Emanuel Navarrete and Chris Diaz fought for the WBO World Featherweight title at the Silver Spurs Arena, Kissimmee that resulted with a technical knockout in the 12th round securing Navarretes victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 1
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2018, Emanuel Navarrete fought Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title at the Madison Square Garden Theater in New York. Navarrete was the more aggressive fighter in the match, earning the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Isaac Dogboe 2
programme.desc: On May 11th, 2019, Emanuel Navarrete rematched Isaac Dogboe for the WBO World Super Bantamweight Title in Tucson. Navarrete put on an impressive performance, scoring two knockdowns and stopping Dogboe in the final round.

programme.title: Emanuel Navarrete vs Joet Gonzalez
programme.desc: On October 15th, 2021, Emanuel Navarrete fought Joet Gonzalez for the WBO World Featherweight Title at Pechanga Arena in San Diego. In an incredible battle, Emanuel Navarrete pulled out an impressive unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: On February 19th, 2000 Erik Morales fought Marco Antonio Barrera for WBC and WBO World Super Bantamweight titles at Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas which ended in a split decision victory for Morales.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Felix Trinidad vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 1999 Felix Trinidad and Oscar De La Hoya faced eachother for the IBF and WBC World welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas that ended in a majority decision win for Trinidad.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Carlos Alberto Ramon Rios
programme.desc: On February 17th, 1999, Floyd Mayweather fought Carlos Rios for the WBC Super Featherweight Title in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Rios was a tough opponent for Mayweather, but Mayweather prevailed and showed out in front of his hometown, winning by UD.
